framework: Serbia - Privredna društva, zadruge i preduzetnici - full Kontni okvir from Sl. glasnik RS br. 89/2020
source_note: Account names are transcribed from the Kontni okvir attached to the Pravilnik o Kontnom okviru i sadržini računa u Kontnom okviru za privredna društva, zadruge i preduzetnike (Sl. glasnik RS br. 89/2020). App-specific REVIEW placeholder is marked separately and is not an official konto.

official_basis.name: Ministry of Finance page for Pravilnik, Sl. glasnik RS br. 89/2020
Publicly accessible rulebook text with Kontni okvir list
APR list of Serbian chart-of-account/reporting frameworks

scope_warning: This dictionary is for the standard framework for companies, cooperatives and entrepreneurs. Banks, insurance companies, leasing providers, pension funds, investment/capital-market entities, NBS and other special entities need their own chart/framework.
